IGeometry.description: Information package geometry in GeoJSON RFC 7946 Format.

additionalProperties.description: A group key/value containing all specific information about the package.

descriptiveInformation.description: A group key/value containing all specific information about the package.

items.description: Deprecated, use `category` instead. For backward compatibility, a single-value list is accepted provided that `category` is not also specified.

category.description: Category associated with the generated AIP. May be empty.

ingestChain.description: Ingest chain label to be used to process SIPs.

model.description: Name of the data model from rs-dam service to validate SIP. If null no validation is done.

replaceErrors.description: Replace error requests with same providerId.

session.description: Name of the sip submission session.

sessionOwner.description: Name of the sip submission session owner.

storages.description: Storage locations where to store files from contentInformation.

storage.description: Storage location name or null if file is not stored yet.

storePath.description: Required store path on the target storage location or null to let storage service handle path.

additionalProperties.description: Additional properties of package context information key/value.

contextInformation.description: Additional properties of package context information key/value.

additionalProperties.description: Additional properties of package reference information key/value.

referenceInformation.description: Additional properties of package reference information key/value.

originUrn.description: URN of the origin package. Used to link the package with an existing package on an other catalog.

bbox.description: Geometry bounding box. List of points coordinates [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax]

items.description: Geometry bounding box. List of points coordinates [xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax]

id.description: Provider identifier for the submitted product.

SIPReference.description: Used to provide SIP content in a json formated file.

algorithm.description: Checksum algorithm of the json file containing SIP.

url.description: URL of the json file containing SIP.

StorageDto.description: Storage locations where to store files from contentInformation.

pluginBusinessId.description: Identifier of this storage location configuration from storage microservice.

storePath.description: Sub-path where to store file(s) on this storage location.

items.description: File type to store on this storage location or empty to store all data types on this storage location.

StorageSize.description: Constraint on files size to store in this storage location (minimal value, maximum value).

max.description: Maximal file size in bytes to store files in this storage location.

min.description: Minimal file size in bytes to store files in this storage location.

height.description: File height in pixels if file is an image

width.description: File width in pixels if file is an image

get.description: Return a page of acquisition processing chain monitors

200.description: All acquisition processing chain monitors were retrieved.

get.description: Return a list of plugin configurations for a specific type

200.description: All plugin configurations for a specific type were retrieved.
